raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, WI XXXX XX/XX/XXXX Billing Inquiries and Customer Service po box XXXX XXXX XXXX, SD XXXX Re : Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX  ending XXXX & XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NH {$110.00} Help! The above transaction was not mine, and your phone teams have proven utterly incapable of even marking it as a disputed amount. I am not a XXXX XXXX member, so I can not renew, and if I were a member I would certainly use the XXXX XXXX less than five miles from my home. On XX/XX/XXXX I used my card at a grocery store here in XXXX. How could I be in New Hampshire the same day? 

I appeal to you to credit the amount while this dispute is investigated and to cease charging interest on the process. 

Complete Chronology On XX/XX/XXXX, my bill included a similar {$110.00} XXXX XXXX charge. For reasons identical to those above, I disputed it and it was eventually ( too slowly ) forgiven. 
CITI ERROR # XXXX : you did not issue me a new card number at that time. 
CITI ERROR # XXXX : theres no evidence you contacted XXXX XXXX to cancel that membership. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, the new {$110.00} XXXX XXXX charge appeared on my bill. On XX/XX/XXXX I phoned, getting a XXXX, who did send a new card. 
CITI ERROR # XXXX : she disputed the {$10.00} grocery bill, not the {$110.00} fraud. 

When I got the bill showing this, I phoned on XX/XX/XXXX trying to correct matters. Theres no evidence they did anything. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received your letter of XX/XX/XXXX saying Were looking into the dispute. 
CITI ERROR # XXXX : the letter doesnt specify the exact dispute, so I couldnt correct your error. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received my bill showing no dispute on the {$110.00} and phoned the next day, running into cutoffs and passing around to various persons. The final person, a XXXX with a male voice, said the credit would appear in 7-10 days and I could dispute the interest later. I see no evidence that this has happened. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received your letter of XX/XX/XXXX stating that the XXXX credit was permanent. 
CITI ERROR # XXXX : once again youve worked on the wrong item. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I phoned again spending over half an hour before I was cut off from XXXX in Billing Disputes, who never bothered to call back. 

Between static on the phone lines, rapid accented English, cutoffs, and apparent gross incompetence, your XXXX help center appears worthless to me. 

If Error # XXXX had not occurred, this might have been settled by now. Surely you must have a procedure to correct a wrong entry by your first contact. Where is it? Please contact me. 

Yours truly, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
